name: Directive Librarian
description: Curate operational directives from messy notes, memory, incidents, proposals, and conflicting instructions into a trustworthy directive library with provenance, status, scope, and supersession history. Use when the task is to promote candidate rules, normalize directive wording, resolve overlap, classify active versus proposed guidance, preserve evidence, or clean up a directive catalog so future agents can retrieve and apply rules correctly.
not_for: generic note summarization with no directive outcome
ordinary documentation that is not meant to govern behavior
